title: Chasing the Rains
desc: Anastasia leads her elephant herd north in search of a river, cheetah Kuleta escapes from a pack of hyenas, and wild dog Phoenix has a new baby.

title: Kui Buri: Thailand's Hidden Eden
desc: Visit a jungle paradise that is a model for national parks around the world.

title: Okavango: River of Dreams
desc: Follows the life of lioness Fekeetsa as she travels around her territory in the Upper Okavango river.

title: March of the Elephants
desc: Presenting a herd's 18-month journey across 808 miles in Yunnan, China. Locals assist and guide the elephants through various environments.

title: Secret Life of the Crash Test Dummy
desc: From top secret research in the 1950s on humans, animals and corpses, to a modern icon of safety. The crash test dummy has led a bizarre and sometimes gruesome life.

title: Texas Gator Savers
desc: Gary, Shannon, Callie, and Damon try to corral a 10-foot alligator in a muddy mess. When a gator in a tight culvert and a busy street mix, the result is one big problem near a local golf course.

title: Epic Animal Encounters
desc: In the slippery rock-lined Sand River, John Varty struggles to save an enormous two-tonne bull giraffe that's gone down and can't get up.

title: Great Parks of Africa

title: River Monsters
desc: Jeremy Wade travels the United States in search of river monsters living in the nation's waterways. He goes from the Indian River Lagoon in Florida to the Lake of the Ozarks in Missouri.
